content: I was assigned to record Father Thomas’s initial statement on October 16th. He clearly said he saw Arjun arguing with a hooded man at 8:45 PM. I typed it verbatim. Later, on October 18th, he came to the station and asked me to change his statement. He said he was mistaken. I told him I could not alter official records. He then handed me an envelope with ₹50,000 in cash and said, 'For the family.' I refused. I did not accept it. But I am afraid. I am not sure what to do now. I did not alter the original statement — it is still in the evidence locker.
